description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.11.5 – 26/03/2026
Desktop
New Features
- AI Meeting Transcript: Paste a YouTube link to generate a transcript from the video
- Database Bulk Edit: Optimize bulk edit support for inline database and single database page
Bug Fixes
- Fixed shortcut conflicts on database cell row
- Fixed plus menu not inserting a new block on document
- Fixed grouping sort order when applying number field sort in grouped Grid view
- Fixed AND/OR condition evaluation order in advanced filters
- Fixed toggling AND/OR operator unexpectedly mutating other filter rows
- Fixed errors when opening multiple row detail pages via relation databases
- Fixed row dialog not dismissing after deleting a database row
- Fixed row document failing to load, resulting in blank content
- Fixed sidebar title not updating after chat page was auto-renamed
- Fixed missing error messages for deleted, trashed, or no-permission pages
Mobile
New Features
- AI Meeting Transcript: Paste a YouTube link to generate a transcript from the video
- Database Embedded View: Added Feed and List embedded view support
Bug Fixes
- Fixed long press gesture to drag issue
- Fixed inline Grid scrolling on mobile
- Fixed Gallery view display and settings panel
